steps.t: Fëoc is at Voi-teltta, west of Ida's camp along the road. Ida has charged you with defeating the Gauradan Fëoc, who has claimed Voi-teltta for himself…
Ida is at her encampment, east of Voi-teltta near the entrance to the ice canyons that lead south. You have reclaimed Voi-teltta for the Lossoth. You …
Lauri is at Pynti-peldot, atop a hill north and west along the road from Ida's camp. Ida has asked that you inform Lauri of your reclamation of the Vo…
